criteria.name: cleaning.py runs on all raw data
criteria.evidence: timestamp_utc column rename removed from cleaning.py — groupby key now retains its name. All 5 PEINP stations produce output (861–1160 daily rows, 20k–28k hourly rows). Exit gate test test_pipeline_execution.py passes 14/14.

criteria.name: Cleaned hourly + daily datasets in data/processed/
criteria.evidence: All 5 stations (cavendish, greenwich, north_rustico, stanley_bridge, tracadie) have non-empty station_hourly.csv and station_daily.csv. Previous review's concern about 3 empty stations is resolved.

criteria.name: Imputation report generated
criteria.evidence: imputation_report.csv exists (38KB), has records, tracked as imputation_report type in pipeline_manifest.json.

criteria.name: Stanhope reference data downloaded and cached
FFMC, DMC, DC computed for all stations
criteria.evidence: Cavendish (1044 rows), Greenwich (1160 rows), North Rustico (994 rows) all have ffmc/dmc/dc columns. Stanley Bridge and Tracadie lack relative_humidity_pct so FWI is correctly not computed. Tests properly skip these.

criteria.name: ISI, BUI, FWI computed
criteria.evidence: Same 3 stations with humidity data have full FWI chain (isi, bui, fwi). Tests verify presence where computable and skip where not.

criteria.name: Pipeline artifacts manifest with timestamps and row counts
criteria.evidence: pipeline_manifest.json has generated_at timestamp. All artifacts have type, path, rows, and timestamp fields.

summary: PASS: Ralph fixed both issues from the previous REJECT. (1) Removed the timestamp_utc→date column rename in cleaning.py so station_daily.csv retains timestamp_utc — the root cause of the failing notebook test and downstream pipeline issues. (2) Created comprehensive Phase 9 exit gate test (test_pipeline_execution.py, 16 tests) covering all 7 acceptance criteria with proper skip logic for stations lacking humidity data. The notebook fix (01_explore.ipynb) now selects the first station with both daily and hourly data. Full test suite passes: 77 passed, 2 skipped, 0 failures. All 5 PEINP stations produce non-empty hourly and daily outputs. FWI computed for 3 of 5 stations (2 lack humidity data — correct behavior).
